# Azure DevOps Demo Generator

> Purpose: Create complete Azure DevOps demo/training projects from templates.

## Canonical URL

- https://microsoft.github.io/AzureDevOpsDemoGenerator/

## Summary

Azure DevOps Demo Generator provisions Azure DevOps projects with predefined repositories, work items, iterations, boards, pipelines, release definitions, dashboards, wikis, and test artifacts. It is used for hands-on labs, demos, onboarding, and reference automation with Azure DevOps REST APIs.

## Important Links

- Project site: /
- Repository: https://github.com/phenixita/AzureDevOpsDemoGenerator
- Hosted generator: https://azuredevopsdemogenerator.azurewebsites.net/
- Documentation: https://github.com/phenixita/AzureDevOpsDemoGenerator/tree/main/docs
- API reference: https://github.com/phenixita/AzureDevOpsDemoGenerator/blob/main/docs/Azure-DevOps-Demo-Generator-REST-API-Reference.md

## Key Topics

- Azure DevOps automation
- Azure DevOps project templates
- CI/CD starter environments
- Work item and board seeding
- DevOps demo data generation
